curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge (65d7070) of PR free5gc/udm#78. Two files changed: internal/sbi/api_httpcallback.go (added input validation for NotifyItems and SUPI format, fixed route path) and internal/sbi/processor/notifier.go (added nil check after UdmUeFindBySupi call). The core vulnerability is in notifier.go where the ok return value from UdmUeFindBySupi was discarded with _, allowing a nil ue pointer to be dereferenced. The api_httpcallback.go changes add defense-in-depth validation. Both files are listed as locations since both contribute to the vulnerability surface.
